title: Docs: Need to update communication channels

comments.body: @mtrmac what should the recommendation be here? Do we need a skopeo channel on cncf slack or do we just mention the podman cncf slack channel ?
I don’t know — personally I haven’t been on a public chat channel for many years. The general Podman CNCF channel is probably the best there is, or maybe just delete that without replacement.
